title: Jen Gordon Khoury Story - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
text:
Jen Gordon Khoury Story - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
All Khoury Stories
Meet Jen Gordon
Align Student
MS in Computer Science ’25
Align Online
After struggling with a lack of support as a middle school English teacher, Jen Gordon felt burnt out. In need of a change, Jen found the Align Online program, and is now pursuing computer science as a way to make other teachers’ lives more manageable.
This program is absolutely giving me the technical skills to be able to really understand computer
frameworks and understand these problems, and to really be able to tackle them at a meaningful level
Jen Gordon, Align MSCS ’25
Explore all Khoury Stories
